# SunPowerPeek

> US Solar Panel Costs, Savings & Incentives by State

Compare solar panel costs, savings, and government incentives across all 50 US states and 500+ ZIP codes. Calculate your solar ROI with our free tools.

## Core pages
- [Methodology and data sources](https://sunpowerpeek.com/methodology/): how every figure is derived, with primary-source citations
- [About and editorial standards](https://sunpowerpeek.com/about/): authorship and review policy

## Key state
- [Alabama](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/alabama/)
- [Alaska](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/alaska/)
- [Arizona](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/arizona/)
- [Arkansas](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/arkansas/)
- [California](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/california/)
- [Colorado](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/colorado/)
- [Connecticut](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/connecticut/)
- [Delaware](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/delaware/)
- [Florida](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/florida/)
- [Georgia](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/georgia/)
- [Hawaii](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/hawaii/)
- [Idaho](https://sunpowerpeek.com/state/idaho/)

## Data
- Primary sources: NREL PVWatts (NSRDB), DSIRE Incentive Database, US EIA Electric Power, US EIA Form 861 (Net Metering)
- All figures are derived from these primary sources; see /methodology/ for derivation and vintage.
